rules.description: Toggle caps_lock by pressing left_shift then right_shift
Shifts Move Forward and Backward by 1 word
Change control + mouse motion to scroll wheel (rev 1)
Use Delete as Move to Trash
Use Backspace as Go to Previous Folder
control + u/y/c = 1del/del to head/del to end
Change input source to English by left_command; Russian by right_command.

rules.description: Ctrl Tab to Command Tab Swap
Command Tab to Ctrl Tab Swap
Swap Win and Alt on Sculpt keyboard
CAPSLOCK is CTRL if pressed in combination, otherwise ESC

to.shell_command:
osascript -e '
                    on zero_pad(value, string_length)
                      set string_zeroes to ""
                      set digits_to_pad to string_length - (length of (value as string))
                      if digits_to_pad > 0 then
                        repeat digits_to_pad times
                          set string_zeroes to string_zeroes & "0" as string
                        end repeat
                      end if
                      set padded_value to string_zeroes & value as string
                      return padded_value
                    end zero_pad
                    set now to (current date)
                    set result to (year of now as integer) as string
                    set result to result & "-"
                    set result to result & zero_pad(month of now as integer, 2)	
                    set result to result & "-"
                    set result to result & zero_pad(day of now as integer, 2)
                    set result to result & " "
                    set result to result & zero_pad(hours of now as integer, 2)
                    set result to result & ":"
                    set result to result & zero_pad(minutes of now as integer, 2)
                    set result to result & "-> 🍅"
                    set the clipboard to result
                    tell application "System Events"
                        keystroke "v" using command down
                    end tell
                  '

osascript -e '
                    on zero_pad(value, string_length)
                      set string_zeroes to ""
                      set digits_to_pad to string_length - (length of (value as string))
                      if digits_to_pad > 0 then
                        repeat digits_to_pad times
                          set string_zeroes to string_zeroes & "0" as string
                        end repeat
                      end if
                      set padded_value to string_zeroes & value as string
                      return padded_value
                    end zero_pad
                    set now to (current date)
                    set result to (year of now as integer) as string
                    set result to result & "-"
                    set result to result & zero_pad(month of now as integer, 2)	
                    set result to result & "-"
                    set result to result & zero_pad(day of now as integer, 2)
                    set result to result & " "
                    set result to result & zero_pad(hours of now as integer, 2)
                    set result to result & ":"
                    set result to result & zero_pad(minutes of now as integer, 2)
                    set result to result & "-> 🍅"
                    set the clipboard to result
                    tell application "System Events"
                        keystroke "v" using command down
                    end tell
                  '

osascript -e '
                    set the clipboard to (do shell script "echo 🍅[$(date +0:)]")
                    tell application "System Events"
                        keystroke "v" using command down
                    end tell
                  '

osascript -e '
                    set the clipboard to (do shell script "echo 🍅[$(date +0:)]")
                    tell application "System Events"
                        keystroke "v" using command down
                    end tell
                  '

rules.description: a-mode for hjkl movement and nm enter and ui tab and ,. PageDn/Up
r-mode for deleting characters with ui, words with jk and lines with hl
e-mode allows for easy back and forth one character, word or line
w-mode = e-mode + SHIFT (i.e. selection, not just movement)
q-mode for general shortcuts like browser tab navigation
Forward slash is an easier right-shift (if combined)
